title: Mosaic posts 653% net income growth in Q1 on higher commodity prices
text: (Kitco News) - The Mosaic Company (NYSE: MOS), yesterday reported net income of $1.18 billion ($3.19 per diluted share) for the first quarter of 2022, up 653% compared to net income of $156.7 million ($0.41 per share) in Q1 2021.

title: Mosaic Stock Could Extend its Post-Earnings Rally

title: Earnings Results: Fertilizer company Mosaic sees high ag commodities prices continuing
text: Fertilizer and feed producer Mosaic Co. late Monday said Russia's invasion of Ukraine continues to push prices of some agricultural commodities higher, with the conflict also impacting fertilizer supplies amid low stocks globally.

title: Mosaic Shares Slip Post Q1 Results, Misses Revenue Estimate
